INDUCTIVE BUILD:
  Strategy: Constraint-propagating prefix building
  Initial Specification:
    Let M = {5LI5LI5L, 5LQ6, 5LICCIIICI, ...} (matching inputs)
    Let C = {5LI7LI5, 3jniseX4, tj9XSV2, ...} (25 counter inputs)
  Constraint: ∀m∈M: pattern matches m; ∀c∈C: pattern does NOT match c
Alternation of 5 remainders
  Matching seeds tracked: 5
  Counter seeds tracked: 25
  [Pre-transformation]
    Pattern: (5LI5LI5L|5LQ6|5LICCIIICI|5vvdJvv|tj9KSV2h)
    Constraint: must-match(5), must-not-match(25)
  [Factorization]
    Before: (5LI5LI5L|5LQ6|5LICCIIICI|5vvdJvv|tj9KSV2h)
    After:  (5(L(I(5LI5L|CCIIICI)|Q6)|vvdJvv)|tj9KSV2h)
    Constraint: must-match(5), must-not-match(25)
    VERIFICATION FAILED: 4/5 inputs do NOT match:
      - '5LI5LI5L' does NOT match pattern
      - '5LQ6' does NOT match pattern
      - '5LICCIIICI' does NOT match pattern
      - 'tj9KSV2h' does NOT match pattern
    BUG: Factorization produced non-matching pattern!
  [Fragment extraction]
    Pattern: (5(L(I(5LI5L|CCIIICI)|Q6)|vvdJvv)|tj9KSV2h) -> (5(L((sub806))+|vvdJvv)|tj9KSV2h)
    Fragments extracted:
      sub806 = (I(5LI5L|CCIIICI)|Q6)
